# Communication Blocks

---

### Stakeholder Update #1
**Impact:** Power loss or degradation to AWS services in the Sydney region due to failure of the diesel rotary uninterruptable power supply (DRUPS). Customers may experience service disruptions, latency, or unavailability across affected availability zones.
**Root Cause Hypothesis:** Suspected mechanical failure or fuel supply issue within the DRUPS unit. Exact cause under investigation.
**Action Taken:** Engineering teams are actively diagnosing the DRUPS system, engaging vendor support, and initiating failover to backup power sources. We are monitoring service health and will provide further updates as information becomes available.
**Next Update:** 2011-06-04T00:05:00+00:00
**Confidence:** 30%
